breedList.metaDescription: A list of all the dog breeds we groom at Chibi Woef.
breedList.title: Our Breeds
breedList.intro: Here is a list of all the dog breeds we treat with love and care. Click on a breed for more information.
breedList.noResults: No breeds found for this search term.

breedDetail.groomingInfoPlaceholder: Detailed grooming guide and information for this breed is coming soon.
breedDetail.characterPlaceholder: Character information for this breed will be added soon.
breedDetail.group1Overview: Intelligent, driven to work, loyal and highly trainable. Can be reserved with strangers.
breedDetail.group2Overview: Watchful, physically strong and often strong-willed. Schnauzers have a specific hand-stripping coat.
breedDetail.group3Overview: Fearless, energetic and often feisty. Most terriers have a wiry hand-strip coat that requires regular trimming or hand-stripping.
breedDetail.group4Overview: Long-backed, short-legged dogs with big personalities in a small frame. Coat care varies by variety: smooth is simple, long-haired needs brushing, and wire-haired needs hand-stripping.
breedDetail.group5Overview: Independent, alert and often quite strong-minded. Most spitz and primitive types have a double coat with heavy shedding periods that require plenty of brushing and de-shedding.
breedDetail.group6Overview: Scent-driven hounds with a friendly but often independent character. Most have short, easy-care coats, with extra attention needed for ears, skin folds or rough coats that require hand-stripping in some breeds.
breedDetail.group7Overview: Athletic, people-focused hunting dogs with strong drive and high energy. Coat care ranges from near-maintenance-free short coats to wire coats that need hand-stripping and long-haired setters that require regular combing.
breedDetail.group8Overview: People-oriented working dogs that are usually cooperative and soft in character. Coat care ranges from short easy-care coats to rich feathering and curly coats that need regular brushing or trimming.
breedDetail.group9Overview: Small companion dogs with a strong bond to their family. Coat care varies widely: from almost maintenance-free short coats to intensive brushing and trimming for long-haired and curly breeds.
breedDetail.group10Overview: Fast, independent and often notably calm indoors. Coat care ranges from nearly maintenance-free to very intensive in long-haired sighthounds.
